name: Grilled Chicken Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, skin side up, in a shallow baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Mix together sake, honey, teriyaki sauce, and garlic salt in a separate bowl.
4. Brush the mixture generously over the chicken.
5. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Place the chicken in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.
7. Baste the chicken again and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Remove the chicken from the oven and place it on a prepared grill, skin side up.
9. Brush the chicken thoroughly with any remaining sauce.
10. Cook over very hot coals for 10 to 15 minutes.
11. Turn the chicken briefly to give the skin a crackly finish.
12. Baste the bony side with any remaining sauce.
